text.tspan: Women and men have equal rights to immovable property, 2023
Women’s rights to own or administer property aren't legally restricted, and there aren't any gender differences
in the legal treatment of spousal property, such as granting the husband administrative control of marital
Data source: World Bank - Women, Business and the Law (2024)
